label: Trait degree data
description: Effect data for one degree level of a trait, including stat changes, mental state behavior, skill gains, and visual properties.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display name for this trait degree. Supports translation keys.

labelMale.label: Label (male)
labelMale.description: Male-specific label override. Falls back to label when absent. Supports translation keys.

labelFemale.label: Label (female)
labelFemale.description: Female-specific label override. Falls back to label when absent. Supports translation keys.

description.label: Description
description.description: Tooltip description shown in trait info windows. Supports translation keys.

degree.label: Degree
degree.description: Integer degree value identifying this entry within the parent TraitDef. Defaults to 0 when the trait has a single degree.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for random selection of this degree when the trait is chosen.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to the pawn while this trait degree is active. Keys are StatDef defNames; values are float offsets.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied to the pawn while this trait degree is active. Keys are StatDef defNames; values are float factors.

thinkTree.label: Think tree
thinkTree.description: ThinkTreeDef assigned to the pawn when this trait degree is active.

randomMentalState.label: Random mental state
randomMentalState.description: MentalStateDef that can trigger randomly based on the mood curve.

randomMentalStateMtbDaysMoodCurve.label: Random mental state MTB days (mood curve)
randomMentalStateMtbDaysMoodCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping current mood to mean time between mental state triggers in days.

forcedMentalState.label: Forced mental state
forcedMentalState.description: MentalStateDef that triggers at fixed intervals regardless of mood.

forcedMentalStateMtbDays.label: Forced mental state MTB days
forcedMentalStateMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between forced mental state triggers. Negative means disabled.

disallowedMentalStates.label: Disallowed mental states
disallowedMentalStates.description: MentalStateDefs that cannot trigger for pawns with this trait degree.

disallowedThoughts.label: Disallowed thoughts
disallowedThoughts.description: ThoughtDefs that cannot be added to pawns with this trait degree.

disallowedThoughtsFromIngestion.label: Disallowed thoughts from ingestion
disallowedThoughtsFromIngestion.description: Ingestion thoughts suppressed for pawns with this trait degree, keyed by ingestible or meat source.

extraThoughtsFromIngestion.label: Extra thoughts from ingestion
extraThoughtsFromIngestion.description: Additional ingestion thoughts granted to pawns with this trait degree, keyed by ingestible or meat source.

disallowedInspirations.label: Disallowed inspirations
disallowedInspirations.description: InspirationDefs that cannot trigger for pawns with this trait degree.

mentalBreakInspirationGainSet.label: Mental break inspiration gain set
mentalBreakInspirationGainSet.description: InspirationDefs from which one is randomly selected when a mental break inspiration is triggered.

mentalBreakInspirationGainReasonText.label: Mental break inspiration gain reason text
mentalBreakInspirationGainReasonText.description: Text shown to explain why a mental break granted an inspiration. Supports translation keys.

allowedMeditationFocusTypes.label: Allowed meditation focus types
allowedMeditationFocusTypes.description: If set, restricts which MeditationFocusDefs are available to pawns with this trait degree to this list.

disallowedMeditationFocusTypes.label: Disallowed meditation focus types
disallowedMeditationFocusTypes.description: MeditationFocusDefs that cannot be used by pawns with this trait degree.

mentalBreakInspirationGainChance.label: Mental break inspiration gain chance
mentalBreakInspirationGainChance.description: Probability (0-1) of gaining an inspiration from the mental break inspiration set when a mental break ends.

theOnlyAllowedMentalBreaks.label: The only allowed mental breaks
theOnlyAllowedMentalBreaks.description: If set, only these MentalBreakDefs can trigger for pawns with this trait degree.

skillGains.label: Skill gains
skillGains.description: Skill level adjustments applied when a pawn has this trait degree. Child element names are SkillDef defNames; text is the integer offset.

socialFightChanceFactor.label: Social fight chance factor
socialFightChanceFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the chance that a social interaction escalates to a fight.

marketValueFactorOffset.label: Market value factor offset
marketValueFactorOffset.description: Flat offset added to the pawn's market value factor while this trait degree is active.

randomDiseaseMtbDays.label: Random disease MTB days
randomDiseaseMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between random disease events for pawns with this trait degree. Zero means no random diseases.

hungerRateFactor.label: Hunger rate factor
hungerRateFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the pawn's hunger rate while this trait degree is active.

painOffset.label: Pain offset
painOffset.description: Flat offset added to the pawn's perceived pain level while this trait degree is active.

painFactor.label: Pain factor
painFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the pawn's perceived pain level while this trait degree is active.

mentalStateGiverClass.label: Mental state giver class
mentalStateGiverClass.description: C# TraitMentalStateGiver subclass controlling how random mental states are triggered for this degree.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted to pawns with this trait degree.

ingestibleModifiers.label: Ingestible modifiers
ingestibleModifiers.description: Per-item ingestion modifiers applied when a pawn with this trait degree consumes a specific ingestible.

aptitudes.label: Aptitudes
aptitudes.description: Skill aptitude adjustments applied to pawns with this trait degree.

enablesNeeds.label: Enables needs
enablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs added to the pawn's needs list when this trait degree is active.

disablesNeeds.label: Disables needs
disablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs removed from the pawn's needs list when this trait degree is active.

renderNodeProperties.label: Render node properties
renderNodeProperties.description: Pawn render node properties added to the pawn's visual render tree when this trait degree is active.

possessions.label: Possessions
possessions.description: Items given to pawns with this trait degree when spawned. Child element names are ThingDef defNames; text is an IntRange count.
